ev.headline: Washington State Legislators Vote to Allow Rivian and Lucid Direct EV Sales
ev.summary: Washington legislators voted overwhelmingly to allow Rivian and Lucid to sell electric vehicles directly to consumers, ending Tesla's exclusive 12-year direct sales arrangement in the state.

ev.headline: Chery to Reveal Solid-State Battery Progress at Battery Night Event
ev.summary: Chinese automaker Chery announced it will showcase latest breakthroughs in solid-state battery technology on March 18, with a prototype offering ultra-high energy density.

ev.headline: GM Shifts EV Battery Production to Energy Storage Systems
ev.summary: Ultium Cells, the GM and LG Energy Solution joint venture, is redirecting part of its US battery production from EVs to energy storage systems amid market slowdown.

ev.headline: Hyundai Launches Casper Electric Lounge with Luxurious New Interior
ev.summary: Hyundai introduced the Casper Electric Lounge as its top-tier trim, featuring a luxurious interior design for the company's most affordable electric vehicle.

ev.headline: New BMW i3 Delivers 440 Miles Range with 800V Ultra-Fast Charging
ev.summary: The all-electric BMW i3 features 440 miles of range, 800-volt ultra-fast charging capabilities, and distinctive Neue Klasse EV styling.

ev.headline: Audi Plans First Rivian Architecture Vehicle by 2028
ev.summary: Audi CEO confirmed the German automaker's first vehicle built on Rivian's electronic architecture will arrive as early as 2028.

ev.headline: Lucid Motors Addresses Robotaxi Ambitions Under Interim CEO
ev.summary: Lucid Motors' interim Chief Executive Officer Marc Winterhoff discussed the company's strategic bet in the autonomous robotaxi sector.

ev.headline: Range Rover Velar EV Spotted with Sleek Fastback Design
ev.summary: The upcoming electric Range Rover Velar features a sleek fastback-like design departure from the gas-powered model, with an upgraded infotainment screen.

ev.headline: Stellantis and Factorial Energy Achieve Solid-State Battery Milestone
ev.summary: Stellantis and Factorial validated automotive-sized solid-state battery cells with 375Wh/kg energy density and 15-90% charging in 18 minutes.

ev.headline: Factorial Solid-State Batteries Promise 600-Mile EV Range by 2027
ev.summary: Factorial's Solstice solid-state battery platform offers 450 Wh/kg energy density, 50% longer range capability over 600 miles, with partnerships from Mercedes-Benz, Stellantis, Hyundai, and Kia.

ev.headline: BYD Overtakes Tesla as World's Largest EV Seller in 2025
ev.summary: Chinese automaker BYD sold 2.26 million EVs in 2025, up 28% year-over-year, surpassing Tesla's declining 1.6 million deliveries.

ev.headline: Pennsylvania Invests $9 Million in NEVI EV Charging Infrastructure
ev.summary: Pennsylvania allocated $9 million in federal NEVI funds to expand electric vehicle charging infrastructure across the state.

ev.headline: Mexico Launches $500 Million EV Charging Infrastructure Rollout
ev.summary: Invisible Urban Charging and ATX Smart Mobility announced a $500 million investment to expand EV charging infrastructure across Mexico.

ev.headline: Global EV Sales Hit 1.1 Million in February, Down 11% Month-on-Month
ev.summary: Global electric vehicle sales declined 11% month-over-month to 1.1 million units in February 2026.

ev.headline: Ford Targets $30,000 EV Pickup by 2027 with New Battery Strategy
ev.summary: Ford aims to launch an affordable $30,000 electric pickup in 2027 using a new EV platform, lighter design, and smaller battery to reduce costs.

ev.headline: Hyundai Ioniq 3 Targets Europe as Automaker Pivots to Tariff-Resistant Markets
ev.summary: Hyundai's new Ioniq 3 compact EV is positioned specifically for Europe amid US tariff pressures, using the E-GMP platform with estimated €30,000 pricing.

ev.headline: GM's LMR Battery Technology Aims to Reduce EV Costs with Cheaper Metals
ev.summary: General Motors is betting on lithium-manganese-rich cell chemistry using cheaper, more abundant metals than traditional lithium-ion batteries.

ev.headline: BYD Super-e Platform Delivers 400km Range in 5 Minutes with 1000V Charging
ev.summary: BYD's Super-e platform achieved a breakthrough with 400km range delivery in just 5 minutes using silicon carbide power chips and 1000V architecture.

ev.headline: US EV Sales Hit Record Volatility in 2025, Down 46% in Q4
ev.summary: US electric vehicle sales plunged 46% in Q4 2025 after federal tax credits expired, marking the first year-over-year sales decline since 2019.

ev.headline: Big Three Automakers Record $52.1 Billion Hit from EV Pullback
ev.summary: Ford, GM, and Stellantis recorded massive write-downs totaling over $52 billion as they pivot away from aggressive EV investments.

ev.headline: 300,000 Used EVs Expected to Hit US Market in 2026 from Lease Returns
ev.summary: More than 300,000 electric vehicles are expected to come off lease in 2026, flooding the used car market with affordable EV options.

ev.headline: CATL Shenxing Battery Offers Enhanced Charging Speeds Beyond Megawatt Standard
ev.summary: CATL announced the second generation Shenxing battery, delivering higher charging speeds than the previous megawatt charging generation.

ev.headline: China Dominates Global EV Battery Market with CATL at 355.2GWh in 2025
ev.summary: Chinese battery makers led by CATL dominated the global EV battery market, with CATL growing 36.6% year-over-year to 355.2GWh usage.

ev.headline: 2026 EV Market Faces Uncertain Future After Federal Tax Credit Expires
ev.summary: The electric vehicle market enters 2026 without government incentives after federal tax credits expired in September 2025, creating market uncertainty.

ev.headline: Sodium-Ion Batteries Emerging as Cost-Effective Alternative for Budget EVs
ev.summary: Multiple automakers including Changan, JAC Motors, and Geely are deploying sodium-ion batteries in budget EVs, potentially 20-40% cheaper than lithium-ion.
